title: Host-Owned Encrypted Offsite Backup Automation Execution
objective: Install a bounded host-native recurring cadence for the already-live `personal-notes` encrypted offsite backup lane by deploying a host-side runner plus system-level systemd timer, while keeping runtime, ingress, auth, and installed-app posture unchanged.
dependency_note: Packet 003 closed the host-owned encrypted offsite lane with live proof but left recurring cadence as an optional follow-on. This execution packet is bounded to automation over that existing lane and does not reopen runtime or promotion scope.
required_inputs: The existing live Backblaze-backed Restic repository configured on the Olares host
The existing machine-local env file at /home/olares/code/personal/.env.personal-offsite-backup
The existing validated host-local notes archive flow under /home/olares/apex-backups/personal/memos
Host evidence that systemctl is present, systemctl --user is unavailable over the current SSH path, and sudo -n is available
constrained_outputs: A host-native runner for creating a fresh notes archive and executing encrypted offsite backup plus retention
A bounded operator helper for installing, checking, and manually invoking a system-level timer on the Olares host
Updated operator and architecture docs that distinguish operator-invoked backup from host-native recurring cadence
A dated handoff recording live install, status, and run-now proof
No public ingress, shared auth, Olares app registration, or installed-app promotion
validation_steps: Deploy a host-native runner instead of reusing the SSH-based workstation helper as the timer target.
Use a system-level timer because systemctl --user is unavailable over the current SSH path and crontab is absent.
Keep the live personal-notes runtime host-only or mesh-tunneled and do not change ingress or auth posture.
Confirm the timer is enabled and active with a real next-run timestamp.
Confirm a manual run creates or updates a Restic snapshot successfully and does not touch the live Notes runtime beyond the existing host-local archive flow.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes helper, operator, and bounded host automation work only. It does not authorize database writes, public ingress, shared auth, or Olares app registration.
closure_note: This execution packet now includes live host-side automation proof on the real Olares host. The helper deployed host runner /home/olares/code/personal/run-personal-notes-offsite-backup-host.sh, installed system units apex-personal-notes-offsite-backup.service and apex-personal-notes-offsite-backup.timer, and registered a daily 03:30 UTC cadence. Status confirmed the timer is enabled and active, and run-now completed successfully with Restic snapshot 76b8155c while pruning the prior host-scheduled snapshot. The live runtime boundary remains unchanged.
next_action: Maintain the host-owned encrypted offsite lane through the installed timer plus bounded reruns of status and restore-drill, and only open a later packet if wider promotion beyond the current private boundary is desired.
